reviews.review_msg: One of the funniest and most interesting professors I've ever had. The random sex stories are awesome. Presentations were fair and midterm paper was quite fair. If you do well on the MT (which almost everyone does), then the mark is shifted to your final as well. The class is really as easy as everyone says if you put in the effort.
SUPER EASY. EASY AS EDUC ELECTIVES lol
A great 3rd year course to take for upper div. credit. Not overly difficult if you keep up. Interesting material. Play the game, and walk away with a good mark.

Very interesting fellow. He's lived a full life and knows lots, his anecdotes and stories are the best part of class. I learned so much. As a mature student, take it from me when u go out in the world its profs like this u remember and who really teach you the most. Plus, course was pretty darn easy and didn't consist of a lot of work.

BOOORING!!!  This guy is unorganized and unclear.  He rants A LOT.  It is soo hard to stay awake.  He forgets what he's talking about, so your notes are full of holes.  He's not a bad guy, but he sure is dull.  Also, he will belittle students in front of the class if they answer incorrectly or do a poor presentation.  Skip 301.  It's not worth it.
Interesting course for non-crim students, probably because of his constant sexual references.  Not marked super hard and very informative.
very interesting class... although I found it hard to pay attention without drooling uncontrollably ;) always made time for me... good times in his office hrs =P
Ehor is a great prof. His lectures are always interesting and he is smoking hot!

Knows her stuff and tries to cover as much material as  possible. However, pace of lecture sometimes too fast, slides not posted online, and some slides have too much text on them making it difficult to read. Paper (book review), tutorial participation marks, presentation on a reading,  mt, and final. Final exam questions heavily based on textbook.

Ehor Boyanowsky is a god amongst men. A ram amongst sheep. A titan amongst the meek. His lectures are enthralling, and those who fail to understand them are simply ignorant of true genius. I highly recommend taking a classany classwith Dr. Boyanowksy.

Easy upper level elective course. Only need to do a presentation and midterm then that's it! Not even a take home final is required. Participation is mandatory. Ehor is interesting and talks about his personal experience a lot. Recommended!
a great guy and great prof. I found this a great elective course to take that was super interesting.

This is the best and easiest siminar class ever! Boyanowsky makes the class very interesting, and his great sense of humor helped as well. There were only one exam, which he graded super easy. The whole class really enjoyed him as a prof.

One of the best at SFU, extremely compelling seminar, wonderful and insightful! Raises controversial issues that other profs are afraid to touch! Can't say enough great things about this class! Professor Boyanowsky is one of the best at SFU!

Aidan is the TA for this course. My friends and I took this class as we thought it would be a good elective. NO, the class is specifically for other programs because if you're a crim major you cannot take it. NOT AN ELECTIVE. SO MUCH WORk even though it's online, every week there is a tutorial which defeats the purpose. 3 credits but worth 4.
